negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, readable words, watermark, photorealistic, gradient, soft edges, anti-aliasing artifacts
mark_style_common: flat, bold edges, no gradient, centered composition, 20% padding safe zone, transparent background, vector-friendly silhouette

direction_catalog.geometric: minimalist geometric mark, simple primitives, perfect symmetry, flat monochrome
direction_catalog.organic: abstract organic shapes inspired by nature, rounded bold silhouette, flat color
direction_catalog.animal: stylized animal silhouette reduced to essential curves, flat monochrome, no facial details
direction_catalog.abstract: abstract conceptual mark, bold silhouette, no recognizable object, flat shapes
direction_catalog.monogram: abstract single-letter monogram shape (NOT an actual glyph), bold sans aesthetic, flat silhouette
direction_catalog.typography-centric: abstract typographic form built from bold strokes, NOT real letters, flat silhouette
